note: Real SGLang-Diffusion output (H200). To add an item: drop the file in docs/gallery/ and append an entry. image -> src; video -> src (.mp4) + poster (still).

items.prompt: An androgynous glam-rock figure, a single crimson-and-cobalt lightning bolt across one eye — a cosmic, theatrical portrait.
A rain-soaked motorway at night seen from a moving car, cold light-trails smearing across wet glass — late-90s alienation.
A northern industrial town at dusk — smokestacks against a bruised sky, a lone figure on a concrete overpass.
Golden-hour light drifting across a 1960s Rio balcony, a nylon-string guitar on a rattan chair, curtains breathing in the sea breeze.
A bunch of gladioli on a worn windowsill, rain on the glass — a melancholic black-and-white still life.
A rover crossing the dust-red Martian surface, mountains on the horizon — a real-time world-model scene.
A weathered brass diving helmet resting on raw linen, soft north-window light — a quiet still life in the spirit of 1950s editorial photography.
An abandoned Art Nouveau conservatory reclaimed by ferns and morning mist, light falling through a cracked glass roof.
A vintage turntable on a sunlit windowsill, a record spinning on a quiet afternoon — warm editorial still life.
A lone heron lifts from a glass-still lake at first light, slow motion, mist peeling off the water.
An Art-Deco travel poster of the Zhejiang coastline — geometric waves, cream and burnt orange, screen-printed texture.
A paper boat drifting down a rain-slick gutter through fallen ginkgo leaves, shallow depth of field.
